ingredients.item: scant 1 cup / 200 g Greek yogurt and ¾ cup plus 2 tbsp / 200 ml whole milk, or 1⅔ cups / 400 ml buttermilk (replacing both yogurt and milk)
ingredients.original: scant 1 cup / 200 g Greek yogurt and ¾ cup plus 2 tbsp / 200 ml whole milk, or 1⅔ cups / 400 ml buttermilk (replacing both yogurt and milk)

ingredients.item: 2 large stale Turkish flatbread or naan (9 oz / 250 g in total)
ingredients.original: 2 large stale Turkish flatbread or naan (9 oz / 250 g in total)

ingredients.item: 3 large tomatoes (13 oz / 380 g in total), cut into ⅔-inch / 1.5cm dice
ingredients.original: 3 large tomatoes (13 oz / 380 g in total), cut into ⅔-inch / 1.5cm dice

ingredients.item: 3 Lebanese or mini cucumbers (9 oz / 250 g in total), peeled and chopped into ⅔-inch / 1.5cm dice
ingredients.original: 3 Lebanese or mini cucumbers (9 oz / 250 g in total), peeled and chopped into ⅔-inch / 1.5cm dice

ingredients.item: scant 1 oz / 25 g flat-leaf parsley, coarsely chopped
ingredients.original: scant 1 oz / 25 g flat-leaf parsley, coarsely chopped

ingredients.item: ¼ cup / 60 ml olive oil, plus extra to drizzle
ingredients.original: ¼ cup / 60 ml olive oil, plus extra to drizzle

ingredients.item: 2 tbsp cider or white wine vinegar
ingredients.original: 2 tbsp cider or white wine vinegar

ingredients.item: ¾ tsp freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: ¾ tsp freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.item: 1 tbsp sumac or more to taste, to garnish
ingredients.original: 1 tbsp sumac or more to taste, to garnish
